narrative:
Jefferson Township has 1,110 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.8 percentage points.
